title: AttemptStartedPayload
description: A race attempt opened (ADR-10): the harness stamps one of these before releasing the teams, and every ProgressionMilestone/AttemptEnded carries its attemptId — one attempt is one self-describing, replayable slice of the ledger (best-of-N filming reruns are N attempts). The roster is embedded so replay needs no side-channel teams.json. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events; aggregate is the Attempt.

attemptId.description: Identity of the attempt; the envelope aggregateId.

label.description: Operator label for the take ('normal-soak-2', 'flagship-take-3'); null for unlabeled runs.

difficulty.description: The server difficulty verified via RCON at stamp time (peaceful/easy/normal/hard) — part of the honest-footage claim, recorded not assumed.

teams.description: The full roster at start — the milestone mapper's villagerId→teamId truth for this attempt.
